title: TAT-3093 verify EVM account group selector and no ValiError on Perps
acceptance_criteria: AC1: usePerpsPositionForAsset derives userAddress from the selected account group's EVM account
AC2: Perps Trending view opens without triggering a ValiError
AC3: Audit other Perps hooks for selectSelectedInternalAccountFormattedAddress (code review only — UNTESTABLE via recipe)
AC4: Unit test for non-EVM selected account empty state (jest only — UNTESTABLE via recipe)

ac1-eval-evm-selector.expression: (function(){ var state = Engine.context.AccountTreeController.state; var groupId = state && state.selectedAccountGroup; if (!groupId) return JSON.stringify({hasEvmAccount: false, error: 'no selected group'}); var parts = groupId.split('/'); var walletId = parts.slice(0, parts.length - 1).join('/'); var wallets = state && state.accountTree && state.accountTree.wallets; var wallet = wallets && wallets[walletId]; var group = wallet && wallet.groups && wallet.groups[groupId]; if (!group) return JSON.stringify({hasEvmAccount: false, error: 'group not found'}); var accountIds = group.accounts; var acState = Engine.context.AccountsController.state; var accounts = acState && acState.internalAccounts && acState.internalAccounts.accounts; var evmAddr = null; for (var i = 0; i < accountIds.length; i++) { var acc = accounts && accounts[accountIds[i]]; if (acc && acc.type && acc.type.indexOf('eip155:') === 0) { evmAddr = acc.address; break; } } return JSON.stringify({hasEvmAccount: !!evmAddr, evmAddress: evmAddr}); })()

ac2-screenshot-market.note: AC2: Perps BTC market open without ValiError
